response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development experience in industrial automation, secure systems, or IEC 62443 standards — core requirements for the role. Their recent work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only a brief, outdated C++ stint at National Instruments over 9 years ago, insufficient to justify senior C++ architecture responsibilities.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse domains.
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring.
Demonstrated ability to build scalable, event-driven systems and CI/CD infrastructure.
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ work; core technical requirement not met.
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or OT protocols.
No evidence of multi-threaded, real-time embedded or IoT system development in C++.
